articles.title: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck - TechCrunch

articles.author: Rebecca Bellan
articles.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish - TechCrunch
articles.description: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.
articles.content:
Elon Musks SpaceX has shown investors a prototype of a handset-like AI device, reports The Wall Street Journal.
The prototype is reportedly sleeker and slimmer than an iPhone, making us wonder if it… [+2280 chars]

articles.author: Ashley Belanger
articles.title: After spooking Trump into safety testing, Anthropic AI models get global release - Ars Technica
articles.description: US lifts curbs on Anthropic’s advanced Fable and Mythos models.
